expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with at least 5 user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Task Statuses",
  "branchName": "task-statuses",
  "description": "Add task statuses.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add task status storage",
      "description": "As a user, I want task status values stored so pending, in progress, and done persist.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task records store a status value.",
        "Existing tasks default to pending.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "dependsOn": [],
      "passes": false,
      "notes": "",
      "parallelBatch": 1
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add backend action to update task status",
      "description": "As a user, I want a backend action that updates task status so changes save reliably.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "A backend action updates task status.",
        "Invalid status values are rejected.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-001"
      ],
      "passes": false,
      "notes": "",
      "parallelBatch": 1
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Show task status badge",
      "description": "As a user, I want a status badge on each task card so I can see current state at a glance.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task cards show the current status as a badge.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-002"
      ],
      "passes": false,
      "notes": "",
      "parallelBatch": 1
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add task status control",
      "description": "As a user, I want a task status control in the list so I can change status without opening a separate flow.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Users can change a task status from the task list.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-002"
      ],
      "passes": false,
      "notes": "",
      "parallelBatch": 1
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Filter tasks by status",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter the task list by status so I can focus on one state.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "The task list can be filtered by status.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-002"
      ],
      "passes": false,
      "notes": "",

  ]
}
